c.d: The rate at which the app can transfer files between devices, impacting efficiency and user experience
Ability of the app to transfer files across different operating systems (e.g., Android, iOS, Windows, Mac)
The maximum size of a file that can be transferred or shared without restrictions
Level of security provided for transfers, including encryption standards (e.g., 256-bit encryption) for safe file sharing
User interface simplicity and whether the app requires registration or complicated setup
Whether the app supports file transfers without internet or mobile data usage, e.g., via Wi-Fi Direct or Bluetooth
Number of devices that can be connected and share files simultaneously
Range of file formats the app can transfer without alteration or loss
Availability of messaging or collaboration tools integrated within the app
Integration with cloud storage services for easier file management and sharing
